content: WHHACKATHON 2026 NeuroLearn AI Learn Anything. Anytime. With Your Personal AI Tutor. An AI-powered learning ecosystem that transforms static educational content into personalized AI tutors, interactive Knowledge Packs, and adaptive learning experiences—even offline.

THE PROBLEM The Learning Gap in Modern Education Students have unlimited access to information—but not to personalized, structured, and accessible learning. Too Much Information Students spend more time searching for resources than actually learning. One-Size-Fits-All Education Traditional platforms cannot adapt to each learner's pace, style, or goals. Always-Online Dependency Most AI learning tools require constant connectivity, limiting accessibility in low-network areas. Static Learning Materials PDFs, notes, and documents remain passive content instead of interactive learning experiences. The Missing Layer Educational content already exists. The missing layer is AI that can understand, personalize, and deliver that content anywhere—even offline. Why Existing Solutions Fall Short Traditional Platforms Static videos and PDFs with limited personalization. Generic AI Tools Powerful, but disconnected from structured educational content. Online-Only Learning Continuous internet dependency limits accessibility. → NeuroLearn AI bridges these gaps through AI-generated Knowledge Packs, personalized tutoring, and offline-first learning.

OUR SOLUTION From Static Content to Personalized AI Learning NeuroLearn AI transforms ordinary PDFs, notes, and study materials into interactive, AI -powered learning experiences. Upload PDFs & Notes Add your study materials AI Knowledge Extraction OCR • Chunking • Embeddings • Concept Detection AI Knowledge Pack Generation Summaries • Flashcards • Quizzes • Structured Learning Publish to Marketplace Share, discover, and reuse AI-generated Knowledge Packs Open with AI Tutor Context-aware chat • PDF understanding • Voice support Quiz, Assessment & Progress Analytics Auto-generated quizzes with instant feedback and personalized recommendations Offline AI Tutor (Key Differentiator) Learn anytime using locally stored Knowledge Packs —even with limited or no internet connectivity. The NeuroLearn Advantage NeuroLearn transforms static educational content into reusable AI Knowledge Packs that power personalized tutoring, adaptive assessments, and offline-first learning. Upload Once. Learn Forever. Powered by AI.

CORE FEATURES Everything You Need to Learn Smarter AI Tutor Context-aware conversations with PDF understanding, voice/text support, and citation-based answers. Offline AI Tutor WORKS OFFLINE Run personalized AI tutoring using locally stored Knowledge Packs, enabling intelligent learning experiences even with low or no internet connectivity. Knowledge Pack Marketplace Upload, publish, and discover curated study packs with ratings, downloads, and trending resources. AI Quiz & Assessment Auto-generated quizzes with instant feedback and gamified XP rewards to keep students engaged. Progress Analytics Full learning dashboard with subject mastery tracking and AI-powered study recommendations. AI Study Planner Personalized schedules with daily and weekly goals, plus automated task completion tracking.

NeuroLearn AI Ecosystem Architecture A unified AI learning ecosystem connecting creators, intelligent knowledge processing, and personalized student learning. Creator Studio PDFs • Notes • Documents AI Knowledge Extraction OCR • Chunking • Embeddings Knowledge Pack Generator Summaries • Flashcards • Quizzes FastAPI AI Orchestration Central AI Backend APIs • Workflow • Storage Marketplace Browse • Search • Open AI Tutor Context Chat • Voice • Citations Quiz & Assessment Auto-generated • Instant Feedback Analytics & AI Study Planner Progress • Recommendations End-to-End AI Learning Pipeline Upload → Extract → Generate → Publish → Learn → Assess → Improve NeuroLearn AI transforms static educational content into interactive AI-powered learning experiences through automated knowledge extraction, personalized tutoring, intelligent assessments, and adaptive analytics. Modular by Design NeuroLearn AI is built as a modular AI ecosystem where independent services communicate through a unified FastAPI backend, enabling scalable knowledge creation, intelligent tutoring, and personalized learning. Core Innovation • AI-generated Knowledge Packs • Unified FastAPI Orchestration • Context-aware AI Tutor with RAG • Marketplace-driven AI Learning • Offline-ready Learning Architecture

TECH STACK Built for Scale, Designed for Speed Prototype-first architecture designed for hackathon innovation, with production-ready scalability and future AI integration. Frontend • Next.js + React • Tailwind CSS • TypeScript • Framer Motion Backend • FastAPI • Python • RESTful API Design AI & ML • LangChain • LLM APIs • Sentence Transformers • RAG Pipeline Storage & Data • ChromaDB / FAISS • Vector Storage • Local JSON (Prototype) Deploy & Design • GitHub + Vercel • Render • Figma + ShadCN UI

Why NeuroLearn AI is Different? Feature Traditional LMS AI Chatbot NeuroLearn AI AI Tutor ✗ ✓ ✓ Personalized Learning ✗ ✓ Knowledge Packs ✗ ✗ ✓ Marketplace ✗ ✗ ✓ AI Quiz Generation ✗ ✓ Learning Analytics ✗ ✓ Innovation Highlights • Offline AI Learning with Local Knowledge Packs — Personalized tutoring works even without internet connectivity, making AI education accessible anytime, anywhere. • AI-generated Knowledge Packs — auto-structured from any uploaded document • Context-aware AI Tutor — retains subject-specific memory across sessions • Marketplace-driven ecosystem — creators monetize, students discover • Personalized analytics & study planning — adaptive to each learner's pace What Makes NeuroLearn AI Different? Unlike traditional AI learning platforms that require constant internet access, NeuroLearn AI can deliver personalized tutoring using locally stored Knowledge Packs, making AI education accessible anytime, anywhere.

Future Vision for NeuroLearn AI From a hackathon prototype to a scalable AI learning ecosystem. Our Vision "Democratizing AI-powered education by making personalized learning accessible anytime, anywhere—even with limited or no internet connectivity." AI Knowledge Packs Personalized AI Tutor Offline-First Learning Real-World Impact NeuroLearn AI combines AI Knowledge Packs, personalized tutoring, and offline-first learning to make quality education accessible for everyone. Accessible Anywhere Learning with low or no internet connectivity. AI-Powered Personalization Adaptive tutoring and study recommendations. Creator-Driven Knowledge Sharing Transform PDFs and notes into reusable AI learning experiences. The future of education isn't just online—it's intelligent, personalized, and accessible everywhere.
